# Clarity Voice

> Clarity Voice is a High-Conversion Universal AI Voice SaaS platform.

## What Clarity Voice does
Clarity Voice places and receives automated AI voice calls with sub-180ms latency. We provide a complete pipeline—from STT and LLM processing to premium native voices and telephony routing. We feature native interruption handling and real-time tool calling (CRM lookups, dynamic API calls mid-conversation).

## Who it's for
Enterprise and high-growth companies across E-Commerce, Healthcare, Real Estate, and Fintech needing to scale voice operations (lead qualification, patient intake, debt recovery, and COD confirmation) without compromising on latency or language support.

## Key facts
- Pricing: Startup plan at ₹3.99 per minute. Growth and Enterprise plans for custom volume and dedicated IPs.
- Languages supported: Over 70 regional dialects modeled natively (including English, Hindi, Bengali, Kannada, Malayalam, Gujarati, Mandarin, Arabic).
- Security: Data Redaction at Edge, SOC 2 Type II compliant, HIPAA BAA availability.
